programme.title: Sing Cowboy Sing
programme.desc: Joe and Benny are two cowboys are on tour in the Wild West as a singing duo usually without a penny in their pockets to spare Joe is a talented rodeo-rider which fascinates the little girl Susanne and gives her the wish to have him as a father Her mother Maria however is to marry the evil rich farmer Dave Susanne wants to stop the wedding so she sneaks aboard Joe and Bennys wagon to persuade them to intervene Dave brands them as kidnappers forcing them to flee as outlaws to one of the families tyrannized by Dave Together they strike back at Dave at which point Maria sees that hes the wrong man for her

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: Arizona Days
programme.desc: Arizona Days

programme.title: Man of the Forest
programme.desc: The kidnapping of an heir to a ranch goes awry when the Man of the Forest mistrusted by the heiress takes matters into his own hands with the help of his pet cougar

programme.title: Speed Zone
programme.desc: Despite the polices preemptive strike the illegal coast-to-coast car race is still on with new drivers Its a race where fair play red lights stop signs police roadblocks and traffic rules in general have no validity

programme.title: Invincible Super Chan
programme.desc: Invincible Super Chan

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.title: Prodigal Boxer 2
programme.desc: Prodigal Boxer 2

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kid Icarus feels awful because his height is a problem Duke discovers a magic lamp and the genie grants Kid Icaruss wish to become bigger Kid Icarus turns into a giant and comes to realize that being bigger has a lot of disadvantages

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to Romanavia to retrieve the royal seal that has been stolen by MAD

programme.title: The Great Grape Ape
programme.desc: Ape shrinks to a six-inch ape when a chemical spills on him in The Incredible Shrinking Grape A talking duck appeals to the pair for help claiming to be a young man suffering from a Harmits jealous spell in Whats A Nice Prince Like You Doin In A Duck Like That

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: Hair Bear Bunch

programme.title: Hong 116
programme.desc: Hong 116

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Underground War
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary about networks of underground tunnels built on the front lines in the First World War During World War One a barbaric war was fought deep beneath the trenches in a maze of tunnels and dugouts over 10 metres underground

programme.title: Great Battles Of The Great War -The Somme
programme.desc: The 1916 Somme offensive was one of the largest and bloodiest battles of the First World War 1914-18 The opening day of the attack 1 July 1916 saw the British Army sustain 57000 casualties the bloodiest day in its history

programme.title: Great Battles Of The Great War - Gallipoli
programme.desc: On 29 October 1914 two former German warships the Ottoman conducted the Black Sea raid in which they bombarded the Russian port of Odessa and sank several shipsthe Ottomans entered the war and began the Caucasus campaign against Russia The British briefly bombarded forts in Gallipoli invaded Mesopotamia and studied the possibility of forcing the Dardanelles

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A faux blind woman uses a young man obsessed with her to get rid of her husband

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A hostage incident takes Nick back to Berlin in 1966

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Jack tries to rescue Ryan and Micki when theyre locked in a vault with a mystic urn that conjures up torturous nightmares

programme.title: Howling V
programme.desc: A werewolf stalks an eclectic group of travellers on hand to attend the opening of a long-sealed European castle

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A prisoner George De La Pena is due for parole after serving time in prison only to be haunted by his past before his release Meanwhile the prison warden John Milford tests an illegal drug for his own personal gain

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: Crypt 306
programme.desc: Crypt 306

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: American diplomat in Paris who built his career on shady dealings loses everything when everyone suddenly become aware of the skeletons in his closet

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is working undercover on a ship trying to find the plans of a super-secret weapon

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: B J McKay a guitar-playing independent trucker who travels with a fun-loving chimpanzee named Bear finds himself caught up with a bunch of young women trying to flee a white slaver who happens to be the local sheriff The Foundlings part 1

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur promises a magician that he will take care of his elephant for a few days and Eds not too thrilled with the idea Meanwhile Kay brings home one wrong dog too many so Roger moves into a motel

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Roger buy the contract of a professional heavyweight wrestler

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Rusted-out plumbing collapses the emergency tunnel just as Hogan needs to get four Underground leaders out of Germany so he creates a health spa

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: All goes well when Hogans gang steals Klinks code book from his safe photographs the contents and returns it to its proper place But theres a small hitch - Carter forgets to load the camera with film

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton devises a deceitful plan to have McHale chosen for the position of Liaison Officer at British Fleet HQ in Australia Parker and The Crew unwittingly help McHale to get the job then must scheme to get him off the hook when they find out that they wont be going along

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: With McHale and his Crew presumably killed in action publicity-hungry Binghamton plays the part of the grieving Commanding Officer when a War Correspondent comes to Taratupa looking for a big story But when McHale and the Crew turn up very much alive and well Binghamton must cooperate with McHale to work up a cover story

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When Gomers cousin Goober shows up in the barracks and puts on one of Gomers uniforms and then wanders the base everyone sees the name Pyle on the uniform and thinks Gomer is losing his mind

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer starts dating Sergeant Carters sister Carter is determined to break them up

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Pentagon is set to launch a new deadly missile that will destroy everything within 100 miles of its path and the island is ground zero

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan finds a young jungle boy on the island as well as a helium supply that the professor plans to use to get rescued with a makeshift hot-air balloon

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Troubles flow when Grampa and George think theyve struck oil on plots of land theyve recently agreed to trade to each other

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Granpa causes problems when he questions the way Kate disciplines the younger McCoys

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is working undercover on a ship trying to find the plans of a super-secret weapon

programme.title: Woman Of Straw
programme.desc: Tyrannical but ailing tycoon Charles Richmond becomes very fond of his attractive Italian nurse Maria The nurse in turn falls in love with Charles neer-do-well nephew Anthony who plots ways to gain control of his uncles fortune

programme.desc: WKRP 203

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Molly is mortified when a secret admirer writes I heart Molly Newton on the town water tower

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Ava is concerned about Taylors involvement with her visiting college friend; Wood tries to help younger son Will deal with a school bully

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam Kincaid races against the clock to find Zoor who disappears after contracting an ancient Taelon virus that has the potential to cause a devastating plague

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Kinkaids brother Max had disappeared during their last mission prior to Kinkaid running into the Blackwood team Now the team stumbles across an imprisoned Max while infiltrating an alien stronghold and rescue him Unknown to the team Max has been transformed into a Robocop-like entity programmed to execute Kinkaid

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcanes sonic experiment designed to kill Alec cross-fires and turns him into his opposite - a kind generous considerate man horrified at his treatment of Alec However if he can stop the experiment it may change him b

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Will becomes involved with a couple who hold a map that Arcane has a keen interest in obtaining

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans land on the planet Arkadia where glyphs suggest it is the cradle of civilisation from which life on Earth began Now it is desolate and Koenig feels it is unsuitable for colonisation Two renegade crew members have other ideas however and take Helena hostage in their demands to settle on Arkadia

programme.title: Dreamscape
programme.desc: A man who can enter and manipulate peoples dreams is recruited by a government agency to help cure the President of the United States of his nightmares about nuclear war but stumbles upon an assassination plot

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The Dukes assist young history professor Laura Bardsley search for a Civil War-era strongbox containing a valuable regimental payroll signed by President Lincoln Boss becomes aware of the boxs other contents - loads of money - and hires a pair of thugs to obtain it When Bardsley is kidnapped and forced to turn over the money to Boss she does so knowing the money was worthless Confederate currency!

programme.title: Hercules 214
programme.desc: Hercules 214

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Zoor kidnaps a comatose policeman in order to use the mans body as a vessel in a consciousness transfer experiment that will allow him to test the human survival instinct and cause havoc on Earth

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Domestic dissension helps the police in their pursuit of a family of con artists; guests Michael Ansara Philip Ahn

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF must thwart four young Nazis from claiming Hitlers fortune which they plan to use to finance a Fourth Reich

programme.title: Cheyenne

programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Skye Folsom at HK50.

programme.title: Hard Knocks

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Their mystic weapons start to fail them Dungeon Master tells his pupils they need to be recharged in the Hall of Bones But first they must find a guide to the Hall

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Two planets one full of people are on a collision course Gillian devises a potion to make the Monster Minds on the deserted planet grow only on one side The unevenly distributed weight will cause the planet to split avoiding a collision

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian and all the wizards of the universe gather together to combine their powers in the orb which then receives strength from the night moon Saw Boss has captured the night moon and hopes to capture power for evil doing
